PreToolUse.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$input = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $toolName = $input.toolName; $filePath = $input.toolInput.file_path; if ($toolName -in @('edit','create') -and $filePath -like '*.sol') { $newContent = $input.toolInput.new_str; if ($newContent -and ($newContent -match 'require\s*\([^)]*,[^)]*\"' -or $newContent -match 'revert\s*\(\s*\"')) { Write-Error '⛽ GAS GOLFING İHLALİ: String require/revert yasaktır! Custom errors kullanın.'; exit 2 } }"
